---
title: "A new doctor in the house"
date: "2026-07-15"
description: "Yixin passed her B-Exam and is now officially Dr. Ma!"
image: /images/news/2026-07-15-news.png
categories: [Team]
---

**Yixin Ma**, the very first graduate student in BioM2 Lab, gave a wonderful public defense today! Congratulations Yixin and wish you the best for your upcoming journey at Harvard University as a post-doc!
